narrative:
Jefferson Twp township has 3,478 registered voters, with 45.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.8 percentage points.
